message: Run created: Update the IELTS Journey website and browser extension UI_UX to use a beautiful **flat, colorful, rounded, modern education app style**, improve all icons using a consistent modern icon library, and f
Task started: Audit current icon usage and existing icon libraries in website and extension
Task started: Select and integrate main icon library phosphor-react or lucide-react
Task started: Create or improve flat colorful theme tokens for colors, border radius, spacing, typography
Task started: Audit and document all UX/UI bugs across website and extension
Task started: Update reusable UI components to flat colorful rounded style using theme tokens and icon mapping
Task started: Redesign and update Dashboard page with flat colorful style and improved layout
Task started: Update AI Tutor UI components and pages with friendly colorful style
Task started: Redesign Study Plan UI with colorful daily task cards and clear progress indicators
Task started: Improve Vocabulary UI with beautiful word cards, badges, and AI Tutor actions
Task started: Update progress and review UI components and pages with consistent colorful style
Task started: Update Settings and AI Provider Settings pages with improved layout and style
Task started: Redesign browser extension popup and selected-text menu with flat colorful style
Task started: Improve mobile layout and responsiveness across website and extension
Task started: Remove old inconsistent icons and unused icon imports from codebase
Task started: Audit changed files for hard-coded design values and refactor to use theme tokens
Task started: Test all updated UI and core user flows for functionality and UX quality
Task started: Generate final report summarizing icon library, theme tokens, components, pages, extension UI, UX/UI bugs, accessibility, and tests
